Package com.longport.sharelist

Class SharelistInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.longport.sharelist.SharelistInfo
  • public class SharelistInfo
extends Object
    Sharelist information.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      BigDecimal chg
      Day change percentage.
      String cover
      Cover image URL.
      OffsetDateTime createdAt
      Creation time.
      String creator
      Creator info.
      String description
      Description.
      OffsetDateTime editedAt
      Last stock edit time.
      long id
      Sharelist ID.
      String industryCode
      Industry code (for industry sharelists).
      String name
      Name.
      int sharelistType
      Sharelist type: 0=regular, 3=official, 4=industry.
      SharelistStock[] stocks
      Constituent stocks.
      boolean subscribed
      Whether the current user is subscribed.
      long subscribersCount
      Number of subscribers.
      BigDecimal thisYearChg
      YTD change percentage.
